# Organizational Knowledge Tools

Optional MCP tools for enrichment. If unavailable, fall back to interview-only mode.

- **WorkIQ** (`work-iq`): Search SharePoint, Teams, emails for design reviews, tech specs, and architecture discussions
- **ES Chat**: Synthesized answers from Engineering Hub wikis — always verify against cited sources
- **ADO** (`ado`): Work items, repos, pipelines, area paths for ownership and project context

## Verification

- Cross-reference across tools — corroborate facts from multiple sources
- Check freshness — wiki content older than 12 months needs additional verification
- Log what you searched, found, and applied or rejected
